calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Michael Hall, Esq. for Plaintiff: Cornelius M. Wise and Geraldine M. Wise.
Plaintiff's Witness: cornelius Wise, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Thomasd Crawford.
Exhibit 1 - Three-Day Notice dtd. 01-18-07-----------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1487 Revere Ave., lower unit, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Back Rent and Damages $2,100.00
Costs $385.00
Judgment signed in open court
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibit in open court.
